overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in a long coat walking along a decaying waterfront promenade in a steampunk-inspired city at dusk. The environment features historic stone architecture, dead autumnal trees, and two encounters with glowing green skeletal creatures.

events.description: glowing green skeletal creature emerges from the right and walks past the character
creature collapses and dissipates on the stone pathway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront promenade in a long coat and hat

notable_agents.action: glowing green skeletal creature walking past the character from right to left before collapsing

entered.detail: ornate stone railing with arched openings running along the water's edge
classical circular stone gazebo with columns and domed roof
tall gothic stone towers and industrial structures across the water
calm reflective water with orange-brown tint from the sky
leafless twisted trees with bare branches

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a stone waterfront promenade with a classical rotunda structure on the right and a distant gothic city skyline across the water. The atmosphere is desolate and overcast. A glowing green skeletal creature suddenly emerges from the right, walks past the character, and collapses on the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown waterfront path with dense dead trees

events.description: second glowing green skeletal creature emerges from the right side vegetation
creature stumbles and collapses into the bushes on the right

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path past overgrown vegetation and dead trees

notable_agents.action: second green skeletal creature emerging from bushes and collapsing on the path

entered.detail: dense brown bushes and tall grass encroaching on the pathway

segments.scene_description: The path continues through an overgrown section with dense dead trees and bushes lining the right side. The rotunda falls behind as the character encounters a second glowing green creature that emerges from the vegetation, stumbles, and collapses. The distant city skyline remains visible across the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront with sunken shipwreck and classical ruins

events.description: large sunken shipwreck becomes visible in the water on the left

agents.ego_description: walking past the shipwreck toward the distant classical ruins

entered.detail: large sunken wooden ship with broken masts tilted in the water
ancient stone structure with tall columns and broken archways

segments.scene_description: The waterfront opens up to reveal a massive sunken shipwreck in the water on the left, with broken masts protruding from the surface. The character continues walking toward a distant classical ruin with stone columns. The overgrown vegetation gives way to clearer views of the decaying cityscape ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a desolate waterfront promenade that transitions from a structured classical environment into an overgrown wasteland of ruins. It begins beside a stone rotunda under an overcast sky, where a glowing green skeletal creature emerges from the right and collapses on the path. As the character moves forward, the architecture falls away and the scene shifts into a dense thicket of dead trees and bushes, where a second glowing creature stumbles from the vegetation and falls. The path then opens up to reveal a massive sunken shipwreck with broken masts protruding from the water on the left, while the overgrown brush clears. Finally, the camera tracks toward a distant classical ruin with stone columns as the decaying cityscape expands in the distance.
